title: Container live management UI
description: View running containers, logs streaming (HTMX), restart/stop actions, resource usage

title: App deploy wizard
description: UI wizard to select app template, configure variables, deploy via docker-compose, view status

title: Subdomain CRUD web UI
description: Create subdomain management pages: list with CRUD, Caddy integration, audit logging

title: Test suite
description: Unit tests for core/security, integration tests with testcontainers, E2E tests with Playwright

title: Settings + audit log page
description: Settings page for panel config, audit log viewer with filters, system stats
